text:
/ci1 1 先輩ではなくＳＯＲＯと呼べ！
すまないが、手を貸してもらえるか。

/ci1 1 そうだな、初心は大事だ。
助力に感謝する、ではまた会おう！

/ci4 1 ……私達の力不足だな。
だが、それを学べたのは僥倖か。
すまない、先に退かせてもらう。

こんなところで膝をつくとは……！
……ぬかった！

イツキ！　無理をするんじゃない！
ここは我々に任せて休んで

/ci1 1 Don't call me boss, call me SORO! Anyway, I'm
really sorry, but could you help us out here?

/ci1 1 That's right, credit where credit is due.
We appreciate the aid. Let's meet again sometime!

/ci4 1 We weren't strong enough... But it was good
fortune for us to have learned that. I'm sorry,
but we're going to retreat.

To think I'd be brought down like this... I was
foolish.

Itsuki! You're pushing yourself too hard! Leave
this up to us and take a rest!
